move_mug_into_drawer.task-description: Open the drawer, pick up the mug, and place it inside the drawer.

tidy_up_table.task-description: Place the golf ball into the drawer and place the cracker box on top of the box.

prepare_breakfast.task-description: Prepare a breakfast scene with a bowl in the microwave and a steak inside the bowl, and the toaster lever pressed.

store_soup_in_drawer.task-description: Open the drawer, place the tomato soup can and tuna fish can inside, and close the drawer.

store_cutlery_in_drawer.task-description: Open the drawer, place the fork, knife, and spoon inside, and close the drawer.

organize_office_drawer.task-description: Open the drawer, place the marker and Rubik's cube inside, and close the drawer.

refrigerate_fruits.task-description: Open the refrigerator door, place the apple, orange, and peach inside, and close the refrigerator door.

store_condiments_in_fridge.task-description: Open the refrigerator door, place the mustard bottle and mug inside, and close the refrigerator door.

refrigerate_canned_goods.task-description: Open the refrigerator door, place the potted meat can and master chef can inside, and close the refrigerator door.

heat_soup_in_microwave.task-description: Open the microwave door, place the tomato soup can inside, and close the microwave door.

microwave_meal_prep.task-description: Open the microwave door, place the bowl inside the microwave, place the cup inside the bowl, and close the microwave door.

store_gold_in_safe.task-description: Open the safe, place the gold bar inside, and close the safe.

secure_tool_in_safe.task-description: Open the safe, place the power drill inside, and close the safe.

store_tools_in_box.task-description: Open the box, place the hammer and power drill inside, and close the box.

fill_toy_box.task-description: Open the box, place the toy airplane, Rubik's cube, and softball inside, and close the box.

store_pantry_items_in_box.task-description: Open the box, place the sugar box and gelatin box inside, and close the box.

pack_suitcase_with_toys.task-description: Open the suitcase, place the toy airplane and Rubik's cube inside, and close the suitcase.

pack_travel_essentials.task-description: Open the suitcase, place the marker and gold bar inside, and close the suitcase.

bake_in_oven.task-description: Open the oven door, place the bowl inside, and close the oven door.

oven_prep.task-description: Open the oven door, place the potted meat can and cracker box inside, and close the oven door.

load_dishwasher.task-description: Open the dishwasher door, place the bowl and cup inside, and close the dishwasher door.

load_washing_machine.task-description: Open the washing machine door, place the foam brick inside, and close the washing machine door.

kitchen_cleanup.task-description: Place the mustard bottle in the refrigerator and place the fork in the drawer.

organize_kitchen_appliances.task-description: Open the microwave and place the bowl inside, then open the refrigerator and place the apple inside.

secure_and_organize.task-description: Open the safe, place the gold bar inside, and close the safe, then open the drawer and place the marker inside.

morning_routine_prep.task-description: Press the toaster lever down, then open the microwave and place the bowl and cup inside.

tidy_workspace.task-description: Open the drawer and place the marker inside, then open the box and place the clamp inside.

refrigerate_and_microwave.task-description: Open the refrigerator and place the peach inside, then open the microwave and place the tomato soup can inside.

store_tools_in_box_and_drawer.task-description: Open the box and place the hammer inside, then open the drawer and place the power drill inside.

organize_pantry.task-description: Place the sugar box and pudding box into the drawer, then open the refrigerator and place the orange inside.

multi_appliance_kitchen.task-description: Open the microwave and place the bowl inside, press the toaster lever down, then open the refrigerator and place the banana inside.

store_snacks_and_press_toaster.task-description: Open the drawer, place the cracker box and gelatin box inside, and close the drawer, then press the toaster lever down.

stapler_and_organize.task-description: Press the stapler lever, then open the drawer and place the marker and wood block inside.

open_laptop_and_store.task-description: Open the laptop, then open the drawer and place the marker inside.

faucet_and_organize.task-description: Turn on the faucet, then open the drawer and place the cup and bowl inside.

switch_and_store.task-description: Flip the switch on, then open the drawer and place the gold bar inside.

pack_sports_bag.task-description: Move the bag to a new position on the table, then place the golf ball and softball inside the bag.

prepare_travel_bag.task-description: Open the suitcase and place the toy airplane inside, then lift the bag and place the marker inside the bag.

fill_bag_with_food.task-description: Move the bag to a new position on the table, then place the apple, banana, and cracker box inside the bag.

full_kitchen_reset.task-description: Open the microwave and place the bowl inside, open the refrigerator and place the mug inside, then open the drawer and place the fork inside.

breakfast_prep_advanced.task-description: Open the microwave and place the bowl inside, press the toaster lever down, then open the drawer and place the spoon inside.

office_organization.task-description: Open the laptop, place the marker and wood block into the drawer, and press the stapler lever.

workshop_cleanup.task-description: Open the box and place the hammer and clamp inside, then open the drawer and place the power drill inside.

pantry_restock.task-description: Open the refrigerator and place the tomato soup can inside, then open the drawer and place the sugar box and cracker box inside.

cooking_prep.task-description: Open the oven and place the bowl inside, then open the drawer and place the spatula and knife inside.

travel_packing.task-description: Open the suitcase and place the toy airplane and Rubik's cube inside, then move the bag to a new position and place the marker inside.

grocery_storage.task-description: Open the refrigerator and place the apple, lemon, and mustard bottle inside, then open the drawer and place the fork inside.

tool_organization.task-description: Open the box and place the hammer inside and close the box, then open the safe and place the gold bar inside and close the safe.

household_chores.task-description: Open the washing machine and place the foam brick inside, then open the drawer and place the bleach cleanser inside.

meal_prep_station.task-description: Open the oven and place the bowl inside, open the refrigerator and place the peach inside, and open the drawer and place the spatula inside.
